name: Sourdough Rye
recipeIngredient: 1 3/4 cups Bread flour, plus 1 tablespoon Gluten
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sourdough starter and water. Stir until well mixed.
2. Add the melted butter and stir again.
3. Mix in the barley flour.
4. Gradually add the bread flour and gluten, stirring continuously to avoid lumps.
5. Incorporate the medium rye flour, salt, sugar, dry milk, caraway seeds, dried onion, and dry yeast.
6. Knead the dough on a floured surface until smooth and elastic (about 10 minutes).
7. Place the dough in an oiled bowl, cover with plastic wrap, and let it rise at room temperature for about 4 hours or until doubled in size.
8. Shape the risen dough into a loaf and place it in a greased baking pan.
9. Let it rise again until nearly double in size (about 1 hour).
10. Preheat your oven to 375°F (190°C) and bake the bread for 30-35 minutes or until golden brown and hollow-sounding when tapped.
11. Remove from the oven, turn off the heat, and let cool on a wire rack before slicing.
